title: CS2 Workshop Update
contents: [p]Today we are introducing optional Supplemental Terms for releasing Counter-Strike 2 items in-game, found [url="https://steamcommunity.com/workshop/workshoplegalagreement/?appid=730"]here[/url], which allows the Counter-Strike 2 team to license items for a flat fee, found below:[/p][list][*][p]Weapon finish: $35,000.00 USD[/p][/*][*][p]Sticker: $6,000.00 USD[/p][/*][*][p]Charm: $6,000.00 USD[/p][/*][/list][p]If a Steam account agrees to these new Supplemental Terms, all of the account's Workshop items can now be distributed where Community items were previously not available, such as The Armory. [/p][p][/p][h3]A Call to Arms-ory[/h3][p]As part of a future update, we are looking for weapon finishes inspired by two themes:[/p][list][*][p]Arabesque Art and Arabian Mythology[/p][/*][*][p]Spy/Tech[/p][/*][/list][p]We are also looking for stickers inspired by two different themes:[/p][list][*][p]Auto Racing[/p][/*][*][p]Fruits and Vegetables[/p][/*][/list][p]To submit weapon finishes and/or stickers to the Call to Arms, select the appropriate option using the updated Counter-Strike 2 Workshop Tool:[/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/3381077/3f23de85ca6d44c82af2cefb0b66d9435e1f783f.png"][/img][/p][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/3381077/4130c29d0220e97f1c31cd3c74f0527afa286e5e.png"][/img][/p][p]If you already have Steam Workshop submissions you believe fit into these themes, you will need to re-submit the items and tag them using the options above.[/p][p]Finally, today we're releasing the Dr. Boom charm model, which can be painted and submitted for a future community charm collection. And we're adding a new Paint Kit type, Custom Paint Job Extended, which includes options for iridescence and other features.[/p][p]We're excited to see what you come up with![/p]
